message:
Add 'dev mode' labels to development build indicator bar (#3462)

Widens the green dev-mode accent bar from 2px to 5px and adds 6
evenly-spaced "DEV MODE" pill labels so the development build is
clearly identifiable at a glance.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
